text:
4. Capital
4.1 Details of your interest in property, land or buildings. Complete one page for each property you
have an interest in.
Documentation required for attachment to this section:
a) A copy of any valuation of the property obtained within the last six months. If you cannot
provide this document, please give your own realistic estimate of the current market value
b) A recent mortgage statement confirming the sum outstanding on each mortgage
Property name and address
Land Registry title number
Mortgage company name(s) and
address(es) and account number(s)
Type of mortgage
Details of who owns the property and the
extent of your legal and beneficial interest
in it (i.e. state if it is owned by you solely or
jointly owned with your spouse/civil partner
or with others)
If you consider that the legal ownership
as recorded at the Land Registry does not
reflect the true position, state why
Current market value of the property
Balance outstanding on any mortgage(s)
If a sale at this stage would result in
penalties payable under the mortgage,
state amount
Estimate the costs of sale of the property
Total equity in the property (i.e. market
value less outstanding mortgage(s),
penalties if any and the costs of sale)
TOTAL value of your interest in ALL other property: Total F £
8

metadata.title: Financial statement for a financial remedy in the family court or High Court: Form E1
metadata.description: Use this form only if you are applying for a financial remedy other than, for example, a financial order or financial relief after an overseas divorce or dissolution in the family court or High Court.
form_fields: Case No
Description of other documents attached
Name and address of solicitor
Name of Applicant
Name of Respondent
Name of court
Reset form
SOT - Address for service
SOT - Postcode of the address for service-1
SOT - Postcode of the address for service-2
SOT Full name
SOT Name of Applicant’s/Respondent’s solicitor’s firm
SOT Position or office held if signing on behalf of a firm or company
SOT Signature box
SOT signed DD
SOT signed MM
SOT signed YYYY
Solicitor’s fee account no
Statement of Truth - Applicant/Respondent signing- option delete
Statement of Truth - Applicant’s/Respondent’s solicitor signing- option delete
Statement of Truth - I am duly authorised by the applicant/respondent to sign this statement - option delete
Statement of Truth - litigation friend signing- option delete
Statement of Truth -I believe the applicant/respondent does not believe) that the facts stated in this application form are true
This is the Financial Statement of the Applicant
This is the Financial Statement of the Respondent
a copy of your last tax assessment or if that is not available, a letter from your accountant confirming your tax liability and business accounts for the last 2 years -Attached

a recent mortgage statement in respect of each mortgage on each other property disclosed confirming the amount outstanding -Attached
a recent mortgage statement in respect of each mortgage on each other property disclosed confirming the amount outstanding -N/A
a recent mortgage statement in respect of each mortgage on each other property disclosed confirming the amount outstanding -To follow
copies of statements for the last 12 months for each account that has been held in the last twelve months, either in your own name or in which you have or have had any interest -Attached
copies of statements for the last 12 months for each account that has been held in the last twelve months, either in your own name or in which you have or have had any interest -N/A
copies of statements for the last 12 months for each account that has been held in the last twelve months, either in your own name or in which you have or have had any interest -To follow

if net income from the last financial year and the estimated income for the next twelve months is significantly different, a copy of the management accounts for the period since your last accounts -Attached

if net income from the last financial year and the estimated income for the next twelve months is significantly different, a copy of the management accounts for the period since your last accounts -N/A

if net income from the last financial year and the estimated income for the next twelve months is significantly different, a copy of the management accounts for the period since your last accounts -To follow
your last form P11D if you have been issued with one -Attached
